description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features large glass windows, multiple balconies with glass railings, and a rooftop garden area. The house includes a carport, a wooden deck with an outdoor pool, and landscaped surroundings with several trees. The main entryway is accessible via a set of steps and is accentuated by a small overhang and a prominent glass door. The structure is primarily composed of concrete, glass, and wood, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The layout is open and spacious, with outdoor living spaces integrated seamlessly into the design.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, balconies, a rooftop garden, and an outdoor pool on a wooden deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, carport, central balcony, and rooftop garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staircase, rear deck, pool area, and outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive wooden deck, large windows, and carport beneath the upper floor.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, outdoor lounge, and secondary entry points.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass balcony railings
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with glass door, small overhang, steps, and minimalistic modern detailing
